rootCause: The live-chat branch in remote-release-smoke.spec.ts required an exact text match for the raw prompt echo after clicking Send. In production, message rendering can normalize markdown/text nodes, so the exact prompt node was not always discoverable even when send/receive worked.
resolution: Replaced the brittle exact-text assertion with durable chat contract checks: verify a new user message bubble is appended, textarea clears on send, then wait for either a new assistant bubble or an error banner and require the assistant path with no error banner.
